```{r}
                 "Normal weight denominator^a^, n",
                 "Overweight denominator^a^, n",
                 "Obese denominator^a^, n"))) %>%
tab_style(
      style = list(
        cell_text(weight = "bold")
        ),
      locations = cells_stub(rows = c(
                 "Underweight denominator^a^, n",
                 "Normal weight denominator^a^, n",
                 "Overweight denominator^a^, n",
                 "Obese denominator^a^, n"))) %>%
   tab_footnote(
     footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>a</sup>Denominator are women who in that BMI category at early pregnancy who have a pregnancy end recorded and a valid total GWG value with singleton pregnancy.</span>")
  )

```

```{r, out.width = '100%'}
gtsave(gwgc_output, file = "gwgc_output.png", path = path_to_save, expand = 10)
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(path_to_save, "gwgc_output.png"))
```

### Figure 7. Total gestational weight gain by site
```{r gwg-fig}

gwg <-  gwg %>% mutate(
    BMI4CAT_STR=case_when(
      BMI4CAT == 1 ~ "Underweight",
      BMI4CAT == 2 ~ "Normal",
      BMI4CAT == 3 ~ "Overweight",
      BMI4CAT == 4 ~ "Obese"
    )
    )
 gwg$BMI4CAT_STR <- factor(gwg$BMI4CAT_STR, levels = c("Underweight", "Normal", "Overweight","Obese"))

gwg_total <- ggplot(subset(gwg, GWG_VALID %in% c(1) & BMI4CAT %in% c(1,2,3,4)), 
               aes(x=SITE, y=GWG_TOTAL, fill= BMI4CAT_STR) ) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#0190DB","#008364" ,"#FFC72C", "#A75523" )) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Total weight gain by BMI category") +
  ylab("Total gestational weight gain") +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(title="BMI category")) + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") 

ggsave(paste0("gwg_total", ".png"), path = path_to_save,
        width = 8, height = 4)
 
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(path_to_save, "gwg_total.png"))

```
\newpage

## 5. Postpartum Weight Change (PPWC)

Postpartum weight change (PPWC) is defined as the difference between a woman's weight at a given postnatal visit (6 weeks, 26 weeks, and 52 weeks postpartum) and her pre-pregnancy (enrollment) weight.

For each scheduled postnatal visit, postpartum weight is expected to be collected within a defined visit window. 
Denominators indicate women who either have a weight recorded at that visit or have passed the late limit of the visit window.

PPWC was summarized in kilograms at 6 weeks (PNC6), 6 months (PNC26), and 12 months (PNC52), stratified by study site and further visualized by pre-pregnancy BMI category.

Furthermore, PPWC at each time point is categorized into three mutually exclusive groups based on comparison with pre-pregnancy weight:
- *Any weight retained*: postpartum weight greater than pre-pregnancy weight
- *No weight change*: postpartum weight equal to pre-pregnancy weight
- *Any weight loss*: postpartum weight less than pre-pregnancy weight

For each postnatal visit, category-specific proportions are calculated among women included in the PPWC denominator with non-missing weight change classification


### Table 5a. Postpartum weight change at 6 weeks (42-104 days)

```{r pnc6 setup}

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

ppwc_pnc6_taba <- mat_ppwc %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  group_by(SITE) %>%
  summarise(

 
    # ---- PNC6 (6 weeks)
 
    "Expected^a^, n" = paste0(
      format(sum(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2)
    ),

    "Missing or invalid visit date^b^, n" = paste0(
      format(sum(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 1, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2)
    ),
    "Maternal death^c^, n" = paste0(
      format(sum(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 2, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2)
    ),
    "Implausible weight change^d^, n" = paste0(
      format(sum(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 3, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2)
    ),
    "Missing Weight^e^, n" = paste0(
      format(sum(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 4, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2)
    ),

 
    # PPWC summary (PNC6)
 
    "PPWC denominator^f^, n" = paste0(
      format(sum(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 0 & !is.na(PPWC_PNC6), na.rm = TRUE),
             nsmall = 0, digits = 2)
    ),

    "PPWC (kg), mean (SD)" = paste0(
      format(round(mean(ifelse(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 0, PPWC_PNC6, NA_real_),
                        na.rm = TRUE), 2), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
      " (",
      format(round(sd(ifelse(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 0, PPWC_PNC6, NA_real_),
                      na.rm = TRUE), 2), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
      ")"
    ),

    "PPWC (kg), median [IQR]" = paste0(
      format(round(median(ifelse(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 0, PPWC_PNC6, NA_real_),
                          na.rm = TRUE), 2), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
      "<br> [",
      format(round(quantile(ifelse(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 0, PPWC_PNC6, NA_real_),
                            0.25, na.rm = TRUE), 2), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
      ", ",
      format(round(quantile(ifelse(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 0, PPWC_PNC6, NA_real_),
                            0.75, na.rm = TRUE), 2), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
      "]"
    ),
    "Any weight retained, n (%)" = paste0(
  format(sum(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 0 & PNWR_PNC6 == 0, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
  " (",
  format(round(
    sum(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 0 & PNWR_PNC6 == 0, na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 0 & !is.na(PNWR_PNC6), na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 2
  ), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
  ")"
),

  "No weight change, n (%)" = paste0(
    format(sum(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 0 & PNWR_PNC6 == 1, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
    " (",
    format(round(
      sum(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 0 & PNWR_PNC6 == 1, na.rm = TRUE) /
        sum(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 0 & !is.na(PNWR_PNC6), na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 2
    ), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
    ")"
  ),

"Any weight loss, n (%)" = paste0(
  format(sum(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 0 & PNWR_PNC6 == 2, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
  " (",
  format(round(
    sum(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 0 & PNWR_PNC6 == 2, na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(PPWC_PNC6_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6 == 0 & !is.na(PNWR_PNC6), na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 2
  ), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
  ")"
),
  ) %>%
  t() %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  `colnames<-`(c(.[1,])) %>%
  slice(-1) %>%
  mutate_all(funs(str_replace(., "NaN", "0"))) %>%
  mutate_all(funs(str_replace(., "NA", "0")))

ppwc_pnc6_taba[is.na(ppwc_pnc6_taba)] <- "0"

```

```{r pnc6 setup2, include=FALSE}

ppwc_pnc6_output <- tb_theme1(ppwc_pnc6_taba) %>%
  tab_header(title = md("**Table 5a**")) %>%
  tab_row_group(label = "Data completeness", rows = 1:6) %>%
  tab_row_group(label = "Descriptive Statistics", rows = 7:8) %>%
  tab_row_group(label = "Postpartum weight change direction, n (%)", rows = 9:11) %>%
  row_group_order(groups = c("Data completeness", "Descriptive Statistics","Postpartum weight change direction, n (%)")) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_stub(rows = "PPWC denominator^f^, n")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = "PPWC denominator^f^, n")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(size = px(18)),
    locations = cells_row_groups(groups = c("Data completeness", "Descriptive Statistics","Postpartum weight change direction, n (%)"))) %>%
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>a</sup>Expected denominator are women who were eligible for the 6-week postpartum visit based on pregnancy end date and follow-up timeline.</span>"))%>%
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>b</sup>Missing or invalid visit date includes visits with missing or invalid visit dates.</span>")) %>%
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>c</sup>Maternal death during or before the expected 6-week postpartum visit.</span>")) %>%
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>d</sup>Implausible weight change defined as absolute weight change of 25 kg or percent weight change is greater than 30% loss and 50% gain.</span>")) %>%
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>e</sup>Missing postpartum weight measurement at the 6-week visit.</span>")) %>%
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>f</sup>PPWC denominator includes women with no query flags and non-missing weight at the 6-week visit.</span>"))


# Fix the gtsave() line - ensure path_to_save is a valid directory
# Option 1: If path_to_save is defined
gtsave(ppwc_pnc6_output, filename = "ppwc_pnc6_output.png", path = path_to_save, expand = 10)

```

```{r, out.width = '100%'}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(path_to_save, "/ppwc_pnc6_output.png"))
```

### Table 5b. Postpartum weight change at 26 weeks (182-279 days)

```{r pnc26 setup, include=FALSE}

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

ppwc_pnc26_taba <- mat_ppwc %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  group_by(SITE) %>%
  summarise(
    # ---- PNC26 (26 weeks)
 
    "Expected^a^, n" = paste0(
      format(sum(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2)
    ),

    "Missing or invalid visit date^b^, n" = paste0(
      format(sum(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 1, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2)
    ),
    "Maternal death^c^, n" = paste0(
      format(sum(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 2, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2)
    ),
    "Implausible weight change^d^, n" = paste0(
      format(sum(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 3, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2)
    ),
    "Missing Weight^e^, n" = paste0(
      format(sum(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 4, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2)
    ),

 
    # PPWC summary (PNC26)
 
    "PPWC denominator^f^, n" = paste0(
      format(sum(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 0 & !is.na(PPWC_PNC26), na.rm = TRUE),
             nsmall = 0, digits = 2)
    ),

    "PPWC (kg), mean (SD)" = paste0(
      format(round(mean(ifelse(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 0, PPWC_PNC26, NA_real_),
                        na.rm = TRUE), 2), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
      " (",
      format(round(sd(ifelse(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 0, PPWC_PNC26, NA_real_),
                      na.rm = TRUE), 2), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
      ")"
    ),

    "PPWC (kg), median [IQR]" = paste0(
      format(round(median(ifelse(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 0, PPWC_PNC26, NA_real_),
                          na.rm = TRUE), 2), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
      "<br> [",
      format(round(quantile(ifelse(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 0, PPWC_PNC26, NA_real_),
                            0.25, na.rm = TRUE), 2), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
      ", ",
      format(round(quantile(ifelse(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 0, PPWC_PNC26, NA_real_),
                            0.75, na.rm = TRUE), 2), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
      "]"
    ),
    "Any weight retained, n (%)" = paste0(
  format(sum(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 0 & PNWR_PNC26 == 0, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
  " (",
  format(round(
    sum(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 0 & PNWR_PNC26 == 0, na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 0 & !is.na(PNWR_PNC26), na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 2
  ), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
  ")"
),

  "No weight change, n (%)" = paste0(
    format(sum(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 0 & PNWR_PNC26 == 1, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
    " (",
    format(round(
      sum(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 0 & PNWR_PNC26 == 1, na.rm = TRUE) /
        sum(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 0 & !is.na(PNWR_PNC26), na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 2
    ), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
    ")"
  ),

"Any weight loss, n (%)" = paste0(
  format(sum(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 0 & PNWR_PNC26 == 2, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
  " (",
  format(round(
    sum(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 0 & PNWR_PNC26 == 2, na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(PPWC_PNC26_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26 == 0 & !is.na(PNWR_PNC26), na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 2
  ), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
  ")"
),
  ) %>%
  t() %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  `colnames<-`(c(.[1,])) %>%
  slice(-1) %>%
  mutate_all(funs(str_replace(., "NaN", "0"))) %>%
  mutate_all(funs(str_replace(., "NA", "0")))

ppwc_pnc26_taba[is.na(ppwc_pnc26_taba)] <- "0"

```

```{r pnc26 setup2, include=FALSE}
ppwc_pnc26_output <- tb_theme1(ppwc_pnc26_taba) %>%
  tab_header(title = md("**Table 5b**")) %>%
  tab_row_group(label = "Data completeness", rows = 1:6) %>%
  tab_row_group(label = "Descriptive Statistics", rows = 7:8) %>%
  tab_row_group(label = "Postpartum weight change direction, n (%)", rows = 9:11) %>%
  row_group_order(groups = c("Data completeness", "Descriptive Statistics","Postpartum weight change direction, n (%)")) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_stub(rows = "PPWC denominator^f^, n")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = "PPWC denominator^f^, n")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(size = px(18)),
    locations = cells_row_groups(groups = c("Data completeness", "Descriptive Statistics","Postpartum weight change direction, n (%)"))) %>%
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>a</sup>Expected denominator are women who were eligible for the 26-weeks postpartum visit based on pregnancy end date and follow-up timeline.</span>"))%>%
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>b</sup>Missing or invalid visit date includes visits with missing or invalid visit dates.</span>")) %>%
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>c</sup>Maternal death during or before the expected 26-weeks postpartum visit.</span>")) %>%
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>d</sup>Implausible weight change defined as absolute weight change of 25 kg or percent weight change is greater than 30% loss and 50% gain.</span>")) %>%
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>e</sup>Missing postpartum weight measurement at the 26-weeks visit.</span>")) %>%
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>f</sup>PPWC denominator includes women with no query flags and non-missing weight at the 26-weeks visit.</span>"))

print (ppwc_pnc26_output)
# Fix the gtsave() line - ensure path_to_save is a valid directory
# Option 1: If path_to_save is defined
gtsave(ppwc_pnc26_output, filename = "ppwc_pnc26_output.png", path = path_to_save, expand = 10)

```

```{r, out.width = '100%'}

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(path_to_save, "/ppwc_pnc26_output.png"))
```

### Table 5c. Postpartum weight change at 52 weeks (364-454 days)

```{r pnc52 setup, include=FALSE}

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

ppwc_pnc52_taba <- mat_ppwc %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  group_by(SITE) %>%
  summarise(

 
    # ---- PNC52 (52 weeks)
 
    "Expected^a^, n" = paste0(
      format(sum(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2)
    ),

    "Missing or invalid visit date^b^, n" = paste0(
      format(sum(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 1, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2)
    ),
    "Maternal death^c^, n" = paste0(
      format(sum(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 2, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2)
    ),
    "Implausible weight change^d^, n" = paste0(
      format(sum(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 3, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2)
    ),
    "Missing Weight^e^, n" = paste0(
      format(sum(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 4, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2)
    ),

 
    # PPWC summary (PNC52)
 
    "PPWC denominator^f^, n" = paste0(
      format(sum(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 0 & !is.na(PPWC_PNC52), na.rm = TRUE),
             nsmall = 0, digits = 2)
    ),

    "PPWC (kg), mean (SD)" = paste0(
      format(round(mean(ifelse(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 0, PPWC_PNC52, NA_real_),
                        na.rm = TRUE), 2), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
      " (",
      format(round(sd(ifelse(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 0, PPWC_PNC52, NA_real_),
                      na.rm = TRUE), 2), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
      ")"
    ),

    "PPWC (kg), median [IQR]" = paste0(
      format(round(median(ifelse(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 0, PPWC_PNC52, NA_real_),
                          na.rm = TRUE), 2), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
      "<br> [",
      format(round(quantile(ifelse(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 0, PPWC_PNC52, NA_real_),
                            0.25, na.rm = TRUE), 2), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
      ", ",
      format(round(quantile(ifelse(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 0, PPWC_PNC52, NA_real_),
                            0.75, na.rm = TRUE), 2), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
      "]"
    ),
    "Any weight retained, n (%)" = paste0(
  format(sum(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 0 & PNWR_PNC52 == 0, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
  " (",
  format(round(
    sum(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 0 & PNWR_PNC52 == 0, na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 0 & !is.na(PNWR_PNC52), na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 2
  ), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
  ")"
),

  "No weight change, n (%)" = paste0(
    format(sum(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 0 & PNWR_PNC52 == 1, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
    " (",
    format(round(
      sum(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 0 & PNWR_PNC52 == 1, na.rm = TRUE) /
        sum(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 0 & !is.na(PNWR_PNC52), na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 2
    ), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
    ")"
  ),

"Any weight loss, n (%)" = paste0(
  format(sum(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 0 & PNWR_PNC52 == 2, na.rm = TRUE), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
  " (",
  format(round(
    sum(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 0 & PNWR_PNC52 == 2, na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(PPWC_PNC52_DENOM == 1 & PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52 == 0 & !is.na(PNWR_PNC52), na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 2
  ), nsmall = 0, digits = 2),
  ")"
),
  ) %>%
  t() %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  `colnames<-`(c(.[1,])) %>%
  slice(-1) %>%
  mutate_all(funs(str_replace(., "NaN", "0"))) %>%
  mutate_all(funs(str_replace(., "NA", "0")))

ppwc_pnc52_taba[is.na(ppwc_pnc52_taba)] <- "0"

```

```{r pnc52 setup2, include=FALSE}

ppwc_pnc52_output <- tb_theme1(ppwc_pnc52_taba) %>%
  tab_header(title = md("**Table 5c**")) %>%
  tab_row_group(label = "Data completeness", rows = 1:6) %>%
  tab_row_group(label = "Descriptive Statistics", rows = 7:8) %>%
  tab_row_group(label = "Postpartum weight change direction, n (%)", rows = 9:11) %>%
  row_group_order(groups = c("Data completeness", "Descriptive Statistics","Postpartum weight change direction, n (%)")) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_stub(rows = "PPWC denominator^f^, n")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = "PPWC denominator^f^, n")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(size = px(18)),
    locations = cells_row_groups(groups = c("Data completeness", "Descriptive Statistics","Postpartum weight change direction, n (%)"))) %>%
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>a</sup>Expected denominator are women who were eligible for the 52-weeks postpartum visit based on pregnancy end date and follow-up timeline.</span>"))%>%
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>b</sup>Missing or invalid visit date includes visits with missing or invalid visit dates.</span>")) %>%
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>c</sup>Maternal death during or before the expected 52-weeks postpartum visit.</span>")) %>%
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>d</sup>Implausible weight change defined as absolute weight change of 25 kg or percent weight change is greater than 30% loss and 50% gain.</span>")) %>%
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>e</sup>Missing postpartum weight measurement at the 52-weeks visit.</span>")) %>%
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = html("<span style='font-size: 18px'><sup>f</sup>PPWC denominator includes women with no query flags and non-missing weight at the 52-weeks visit.</span>"))


# Fix the gtsave() line - ensure path_to_save is a valid directory
# Option 1: If path_to_save is defined
gtsave(ppwc_pnc52_output, filename = "ppwc_pnc52_output.png", path = path_to_save, expand = 10)

```

```{r, out.width = '100%'}

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(path_to_save, "/ppwc_pnc52_output.png"))
```

\newpage

### Figure 8. Postpartum weight change trajectory by site
```{r ppwc plot setup2, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# --- 0) Define region membership (keep only listed sites) ---
site_region <- tibble::tibble(
  SITE = c("Ghana", "Kenya", "Zambia", "India-CMC", "India-SAS", "Pakistan"),
  Region = c("Africa", "Africa", "Africa", "Asia", "Asia", "Asia")
)

site_colors <- c(
  "Ghana"      = "#E41A1C",  # red
  "Kenya"      = "#377EB8",  # blue
  "Zambia"     = "#4DAF4A",  # green
  "India-CMC"  = "#984EA3",  # purple
  "India-SAS"  = "#FF7F00",  # orange
  "Pakistan"   = "#A65628"   # brown
)

# --- 1) Make long dataset from mat_ppwc with denom/query filters per-visit ---
ppwc_long <- mat_ppwc %>%
  semi_join(site_region, by = "SITE") %>%
  select(
    SITE, MOMID, PREGID,
    PPWC_PNC6,  PPWC_PNC26,  PPWC_PNC52,
    PPWC_PNC6_DENOM,  PPWC_PNC26_DENOM,  PPWC_PNC52_DENOM,
    PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6, PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26, PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(PPWC_PNC6, PPWC_PNC26, PPWC_PNC52),
    names_to = "VisitVar",
    values_to = "PPWC_kg"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Visit = case_when(
      VisitVar == "PPWC_PNC6"  ~ "PNC6 (6 wk)",
      VisitVar == "PPWC_PNC26" ~ "PNC26 (6 mo)",
      VisitVar == "PPWC_PNC52" ~ "PNC52 (12 mo)"
    ),
    Visit = factor(Visit, levels = c("PNC6 (6 wk)", "PNC26 (6 mo)", "PNC52 (12 mo)")),
    Time_months = case_when(
      Visit == "PNC6 (6 wk)"   ~ 1.5,
      Visit == "PNC26 (6 mo)"  ~ 6,
      Visit == "PNC52 (12 mo)" ~ 12
    ),
    DENOM = case_when(
      VisitVar == "PPWC_PNC6"  ~ PPWC_PNC6_DENOM,
      VisitVar == "PPWC_PNC26" ~ PPWC_PNC26_DENOM,
      VisitVar == "PPWC_PNC52" ~ PPWC_PNC52_DENOM
    ),
    QUERY = case_when(
      VisitVar == "PPWC_PNC6"  ~ PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6,
      VisitVar == "PPWC_PNC26" ~ PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26,
      VisitVar == "PPWC_PNC52" ~ PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52
    )
  ) %>%
  left_join(site_region, by = "SITE") %>%
  filter(DENOM == 1, QUERY == 0) %>%   # <-- key: analytic denominator only
  select(Region, SITE, MOMID, PREGID, Visit, Time_months, PPWC_kg)

# --- 2) Mean, SD, n, 95% CI by region/site/visit ---
means <- ppwc_long %>%
  group_by(Region, SITE, Visit, Time_months) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_PPWC = mean(PPWC_kg, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_PPWC   = sd(PPWC_kg, na.rm = TRUE),
    n         = sum(!is.na(PPWC_kg)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    se      = sd_PPWC / sqrt(pmax(n, 1)),
    ci_low  = mean_PPWC - 1.96 * se,
    ci_high = mean_PPWC + 1.96 * se
  )

# --- 3) Plot helper ---
library(ggplot2)

p_by_region <- ggplot(
  means,
  aes(x = Time_months, y = mean_PPWC, color = SITE, group = SITE)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.3, lineend = "round", na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_point(size = 3.2, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high),
    width = 0.25, linewidth = 0.9, alpha = 0.7, na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = site_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1.5, 6, 12),
    labels = c("PNC6\n(6 wk)", "PNC26\n(6 mo)", "PNC52\n(12 mo)")
  ) + scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(
      floor(min(means$ci_low, na.rm = TRUE)),
      ceiling(max(means$ci_high, na.rm = TRUE)),
      by = 1
    )
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Region, ncol = 2) +   # <- Africa on top, Asia below
  labs(
    title = "Postpartum Weight Change by Site, by Region",
    subtitle = "Mean PPWC (kg) Â± 95% CI at 6 weeks, 6 months, and 12 months postpartum",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean PPWC (kg)",
    color = "Site"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.key.width = grid::unit(14, "pt"),
    legend.key.height = grid::unit(10, "pt"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 6))
  )


# --- 5) Save ---
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(path_to_save, "PPWC_by_Region.png"),
  plot = p_by_region,
  width = 10,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300,
  units = "in"
)
```


```{r, out.width = '100%', fig.align='center'}

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(path_to_save, "/PPWC_by_Region.png"))
```

### Figure 9. Postpartum weight change trajectory by BMI group
```{r ppwc plot setup, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

ppwc_long_bmi <- mat_ppwc %>%
  select(  SITE, MOMID, PREGID,
    BMI4CAT_ENROLL,
    PPWC_PNC6,  PPWC_PNC26,  PPWC_PNC52,
    PPWC_PNC6_DENOM,  PPWC_PNC26_DENOM,  PPWC_PNC52_DENOM,
    PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6, PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26, PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(PPWC_PNC6, PPWC_PNC26, PPWC_PNC52),
    names_to  = "VisitVar",
    values_to = "PPWC_kg"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Visit = case_when(
      VisitVar == "PPWC_PNC6"  ~ "PNC6 (6 wk)",
      VisitVar == "PPWC_PNC26" ~ "PNC26 (6 mo)",
      VisitVar == "PPWC_PNC52" ~ "PNC52 (12 mo)"
    ),
    Time_months = case_when(
      Visit == "PNC6 (6 wk)"   ~ 1.5,
      Visit == "PNC26 (6 mo)"  ~ 6,
      Visit == "PNC52 (12 mo)" ~ 12
    ),
    DENOM = case_when(
      VisitVar == "PPWC_PNC6"  ~ PPWC_PNC6_DENOM,
      VisitVar == "PPWC_PNC26" ~ PPWC_PNC26_DENOM,
      VisitVar == "PPWC_PNC52" ~ PPWC_PNC52_DENOM
    ),
    QUERY = case_when(
      VisitVar == "PPWC_PNC6"  ~ PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC6,
      VisitVar == "PPWC_PNC26" ~ PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC26,
      VisitVar == "PPWC_PNC52" ~ PPWC_IND_QUERY_PNC52
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    DENOM == 1,
    QUERY == 0,
    !is.na(PPWC_kg),
    !is.na(BMI4CAT_ENROLL)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    BMI4CAT_ENROLL = factor(
      BMI4CAT_ENROLL,
      levels = c(0, 1, 2, 3),
      label = c("Underweight", "Normal weight", "Overweight", "Obese")
    )
  )
ppwc_bmi_summary <- ppwc_long_bmi %>%
  group_by(BMI4CAT_ENROLL, Visit, Time_months) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_PPWC = mean(PPWC_kg),
    sd_PPWC   = sd(PPWC_kg),
    n         = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    se      = sd_PPWC / sqrt(n),
    ci_low  = mean_PPWC - 1.96 * se,
    ci_high = mean_PPWC + 1.96 * se
  )

bmi_colors <- c(
  "Underweight"   = "#E41A1C",  # red
  "Normal weight" = "#4DAF4A",   # blue
  "Overweight"    = "#377EB8", # green
  "Obese"         = "#984EA3"   # purple
)


gg_ppwc_by_bmi <- ggplot(ppwc_bmi_summary,
  aes(
    x = Time_months,
    y = mean_PPWC,
    color = BMI4CAT_ENROLL,
    group = BMI4CAT_ENROLL
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high),
    width = 0.25,
    linewidth = 0.9,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0,
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "gray40"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = bmi_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1.5, 6, 12),
    labels = c("PNC6\n(6 wk)", "PNC26\n(6 mo)", "PNC52\n(12 mo)")
  ) + scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(
      floor(min(ppwc_bmi_summary$ci_low, na.rm = TRUE)),
      ceiling(max(ppwc_bmi_summary$ci_high, na.rm = TRUE)),
      by = 1
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Postpartum Weight Change by BMI at Enrollment",
    subtitle = "Mean PPWC (kg) Â± 95% CI at 6 weeks, 6 months, and 12 months postpartum",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean PPWC (kg)",
    color = "BMI at enrollment"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 6)),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(path_to_save, "PPWC_by_BMI.png"),
  plot = gg_ppwc_by_bmi,
  width = 10,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)
```


```{r, out.width = '100%', fig.align='center'}

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(path_to_save, "/PPWC_by_BMI.png"))
```
